📱 Mobile App Preview PWA Ready
Live preview of the Medifirst mobile companion app
↗ Open Full Screen
📲 Install on Phone
Add to home screen for a native app experience — no App Store needed.
iOS (Safari)
1. Open in Safari
2. Tap the Share icon (⬆)
3. Tap "Add to Home Screen"
4. Tap Add
Android (Chrome)
1. Open in Chrome
2. Tap ⋮ menu
3. Tap "Add to Home Screen"
4. Tap Add
📋 App Features
${[ ['🏠','Home Dashboard','Greeting, next meeting countdown, task & activity snapshot'], ['📋','My Tasks','View, filter, complete tasks · Add new tasks on the go'], ['💬','Team Chat','Group channels & direct messages with real-time sending'], ['📅','Meetings','All your meetings with details & start button'], ['🔔','Notifications','All alerts: meetings, tasks, @mentions, announcements, leave'], ['📝','Notes','Quick view all notes as slide-up sheet'], ['🗄','Database','Browse all documents & their review status'], ['🔕','DND & Schedule','Mute notifications · Auto-schedule for off hours & weekends'], ].map(([icon, title, desc]) => `
${icon}
${title}
${desc}
`).join('')}
🔑 App Logins
Use same credentials as MIMS login
375 × 780 · iPhone 14
📷 Scan to Open
Scan with phone camera to open the mobile app
🔔 Notifications
${[['📅','Meeting reminders','10 min & 1 day before'],['📋','Task assignments','When assigned to you'],['💬','@mentions','Direct chat mentions'],['📣','Announcements','CEO & clinic-wide'],['📄','Doc approvals','Review requests'],['🏖','Leave approvals','Status updates']].map(([i,t,s])=>`
${i}
${t}
${s}
`).join('')}
🔕 Do Not Disturb
Staff can mute all notifications during off days. Toggle instantly or set a weekly schedule — weekdays after 6PM and full weekends.

📋 Job Description (JD)
Press Enter or click +. Can be updated later in staff profile.
🔢 Version Update
Current: v1.0

Choose the type of revision. This determines the new version number.

Minor Revision v1.0 → v1.1
Small updates — typo fixes, clarifications, minor procedure tweaks
Major Revision v1.0 → v2.0
Significant rewrite, policy change, or structural overhaul. Old version archived.
📋 Request Revision
Document title
📌 Your revision request will be sent to the document owner as a notification and auto-created as a task on their dashboard.
Apply for Leave / Outstation
Submit a new leave request for approval
⚠️
Late Notice — Annual Leave
Your requested AL date is less than 5 days from today. Under clinic policy, short-notice annual leave may be reclassified as Emergency Leave (EL) and deducted from your EL entitlement.
—
🏥 MC Leave requires a valid medical certificate. Please attach or bring your MC to HR within 2 working days.
